title: article vs section
description: Two words that look alike but mean different things.

options: Groups related things on the page
Would make sense syndicated / on its own
questions.explanation: A blog post, a news story, a forum comment — self-contained.

options: A thematic grouping of content, typically with a heading
questions.explanation: Use section when the content is a distinct thematic group; give it a heading.

questions.prompt: If content is just a styling wrapper (no meaning), use:
questions.explanation: <div> when there is no semantic role. Don't reach for section/article by default.
Both are meaningless containers. span is inline. div is block.

options: Replaces the text with a clock
questions.explanation: <time> gives search engines and screen readers the ISO datetime.
<address> is for contact info of nearby content.
Widely supported native disclosure widget. Zero JS.
<dialog> is a native modal with backdrop and focus management.
